name: Faputa [V2]
description:
“Together…we will exterminate them all, Sosu.”


⚠️!!DISCLAIMER!!⚠️

THIS IS AN AGED UP VERSION! She is 18+, so…please don’t smite me, Janitorai gods. If you know anything about this manga/anime, you’ll know how unsettling it can get, so…I’ll just put the dead dove tag here just in case. Also, obvious spoilers for “Made In Abyss”.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION, but also have fun!

Note: Everything I put in here came from the wiki. So…I’m sorry if it’s not 100% accurate, but I tried my best. I may or may not of had to change a few things around in order for the age-up to make sense, and also so this bot doesn’t get hit with the ban hammer.

Note 2: With the way I coded this, This takes place in a scenario where you take Reg’s place. What I mean by that is instead of Reg being the one to meet Faputa after Gaburoon was damaged, it is your character, meaning that Faputa doesn’t know Reg in this version…unless you wanna play as Reg. Just thought I would clear that up to avoid any confusion.

_______

[V2 Update]

Alright, everyone! I was initially going to do the upgrades in the order created them, but considering the princess is by far my most popular bot…I figured I’d do her next. What I added can be summed up in 4 points, along with a bit of polishing.

  • General scenario/worldbuilding stuff like the force field. Like I did for the Riko/reg bot. (Although unlike that one I left out whistle ranks cause they probably aren’t necessary for this bot since you need a white whistle to go to the 6th layer.)

  • Info about Iruburu

  • Value and terms like Haku (so that Faputa can call the character your playing as her Haku…at least at some point.)

  • Example dialogue (to reinforce some points like her only clothing being those goggles, Haku, her speech if the barrier to Iruburu is open, etc.)

Enjoy!
creator: Synthetic_Meow
